textByHashes.9acab4019f01f5cefbb748276b2db3b2d4ceb2ca: One finds that hard to believe. Out of my way, let me see for myself.
textByHashes.7fae696c31bf0e0263d4e0b0c12f63c7dfbacacd: One was right not to trust your word, common as it is. The garden is not yet complete.
textByHashes.75311bf02f763867c80b05f7a76591f229a889e8: I see that the hasn't finished growing.
textByHashes.6d9f41ef2ece1248b47ed884ec95b9893b5fecf8: I see that the haven't finished growing.
textByHashes.73335963ad23a78c3f080da5d8a2eec6de702249: Oh look, the hasn't finished growing.
textByHashes.fa739c82b91a9151e57a187a34061d0a87733247: Oh look, the haven't finished growing.
textByHashes.96ae9a006dc0e17f3ee5c9c527296276b6f10b8d: To add to that, the hasn't finished growing.
textByHashes.c737df85d779b7a0f470e397985913141e5dad15: To add to that, the haven't finished growing.
textByHashes.5429bb8b4bd8f76d576c50bf804516eab84c9e69: And what a surprise, the hasn't finished growing.
textByHashes.110f9c0e39568a29f786de875be9c7aabed36019: And what a surprise, the haven't finished growing.
textByHashes.9c52d03e5cc51c3371613a915fca2dc549f29e75: Oh you are doing so well, the hasn't finished growing.
textByHashes.0c93f75e1ee34bb897e217caa83f12768f058dec: Oh you are doing so well, the haven't finished growing.
textByHashes.af9a83eef4bd6ccecac275dbb93b4cae13f4b6e6: To add insult to injury, the hasn't finished growing.
textByHashes.286d90eb024a2bdce383cbd838b22ec18e29570a: To add insult to injury, the haven't finished growing.
textByHashes.cf6bb27fde8f1304b6084c79e51a0befff4f7803: And finally, the hasn't finished growing.
textByHashes.8569681c73ff25a6d7a1e79eef7c70e5542939c8: And finally, the haven't finished growing.
textByHashes.4273c82e6ea57fc0aa4d1dca6587dba5fc493bfe: One suggest you learn a little patience. These plants should not take long to grow - these patches have been filled with extremely fertile soil that was very expensive to import.
textByHashes.773187f13472bb493d5b91c7dea37264dae42aac: Oh yes, very nice, if a little yobbish. Rollie will be so pleased–
textByHashes.c75256f70a970af0f00bbf6df7460d4e6c408ed7: You will address my husband by his proper title!!!!! Speaking of whom, I think it is time that we brought him to see his new garden. And when one says we, one means you.
textByHashes.c17cff68fe4202cf4463049dc5758a3d8d87a0fa: So are you going to get Rollie then?
textByHashes.8835c646e8ea7c683bf0d09da9df7e0df7d7b8ca: Well hurry along peasant. This garden will be such a wonderful surprise!
